name: md-cli
description: CLI to interact with Obsidian vaults on a headless server

scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && bun run gen
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && bun run gen
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && bun run gen

author: thejafe
